headline: Robinhood (HOOD) Q1 Earnings Today — What Investors Need to Watch
summary: U.S.-based Robinhood Markets (HOOD) is set to report its first-quarter results on Tuesday, April 28. The stock is down 25.7% year-to-date but remains up more than 70% over the past year. Robinhood delivered strong results in 2025, helped by higher trading activity across stocks, options, and crypto during volatile markets. headline: Socure Q1 2026 Results: $340M+ Total ARR with 62% YoY Profitable Growth
summary: INCLINE VILLAGE, Nev., April 28, 2026--Socure, the leading infrastructure for identity and risk intelligence, today announced record first quarter results, closing Q1 2026 with 62% year-over-year total new annual recurring revenue growth, more than $31 million in new bookings and 134% net dollar retention across a base of more than 3,000 customers.

headline: Robinhood Sinks On Earnings Miss As Cryptocurrency Revenue Slumps
summary: Robinhood stock sank in extended trading.  Management said it anticipates "investing an additional $100 million to build and support the user interface for Trump Accounts."  A Trump Account (or 530A account) is essentially a children's IRA: a tax-advantaged, child-focused investment vehicle, designed to build long-term wealth.

A Trump Account (or 530A account) is essentially a children's IRA: a tax-advantaged, child-focused investment vehicle, designed to build long-term wealth.

headline: Robinhood (NASDAQ:HOOD) Misses Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations, Stock Drops

headline: How The Robinhood (HOOD) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Growth And Crypto Assumptions
summary: Robinhood Markets is back in focus after a fair value estimate was cut from US$124.62 to US$101.15, a reduction of about 19% in the modelled price target. This shift sits within an active analyst debate, with some research teams trimming targets while others raise or initiate coverage based on differing views of trading activity, crypto exposure, and new product traction. Read on to see how these competing calls fit together and how you can keep track of the evolving narrative around the...
